zh.South Cowton, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾素斯 考福頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Wycliffe於1436年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾威克里夫時，她的父親John Wycliffe Esq.25歲，母親Agnes Rokeby18歲。她於1448年與Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1482年8月22日在英國越可爾宏比享年46歲，埋葬在英國越可爾素斯 考福頓。

zh-hans.South Cowton, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾素斯 考福頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Wycliffe于1436年出生在英国英格兰越可爾威克里夫时，她的父亲John Wycliffe Esq.25岁，母亲Agnes Rokeby18岁。她于1448年与Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1482年8月22日在英国越可爾宏比享年46岁，埋葬在英国越可爾素斯 考福頓。

nameMeanings.name: Wycliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Wycliffe (NR Yorks).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Wycliffe was born in 1436, in Wycliffe, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Wycliffe Esq., was 25 and her mother, Agnes Rokeby, was 18. She married Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton in 1448, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 22 August 1482, in Hornby, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in South Cowton, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Wycliffe est née en 1436, à Wycliffe, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Wycliffe Esq., avait 25 ans et sa mère, Agnes Rokeby, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton en 1448, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 août 1482, à Hornby, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à South Cowton, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Wycliffe 1436 in Wycliffe, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Wycliffe Esq. 25 und ihre Mutter Agnes Rokeby 18. Sie hat 1448 in Yorkshire, England Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. August 1482 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Hornby, Yorkshire, England und wurde in South Cowton, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Wycliffe è nata il nel 1436 nel Wycliffe, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Wycliffe Esq., aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Agnes Rokeby, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton nel 1448, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 22 agosto 1482, nel Hornby, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a South Cowton, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Wycliffe, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアウイクリフ
ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Hornby, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアホールンビー
ja.South Cowton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアソウス コウトン
ja.lifeSummary: Alice Wycliffeが1436年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアウイクリフで生まれた時，父John Wycliffe Esq.は25歳，母Agnes Rokebyは18歳であった。1448年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでSir Richard Conyers of South Cowtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1482年8月22日にイギリスヨークシュアイアホールンビーで46歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアソウス コウトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Wycliffe(이)가 1436년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 윈이클리프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Wycliffe Esq.(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Rokeby(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1448년 영국 요르크실르에서 Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1482년 8월 22일 영국 요르크실르 호른비에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 소우스 코우턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Wycliffe nasceu em 1436, em Wycliffe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Wycliffe Esq., tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Rokeby, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton em 1448, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1482, em Hornby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em South Cowton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Wycliffe родилась в 1436 г. в местности виклифф, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Wycliffe Esq. было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Rokeby, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton в 1448 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 22 августа 1482 г. в местности хаурнби, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности соут коутон, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Wycliffe nació en 1436, en Wycliffe, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Wycliffe Esq., tenía 25 años y su mamá, Agnes Rokeby, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Conyers of South Cowton en 1448, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 22 de agosto de 1482, en Hornby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en South Cowton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
